message:
fix(tests): hold semaphore permits across MockPool connection lifetime

MockPool's semaphore permit was dropping immediately after acquire(),
so capacity was never enforced. Use OwnedSemaphorePermit stored in
MockConnection to hold the permit until release. Remove redundant
checked_out atomic counter. Strengthen concurrent tests with
max_in_flight assertions proving capacity bounds hold under 4
concurrent acquires.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
